columns.name: Issue Message
sample_values: 'http://schema.org/foundingDate' is recommended to be of type 'http://schema.org/Date' in 'Organization' [currently='2018']
'http://schema.org/addressCountry' is recommended to be of type 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code' in 'PostalAddress' [currently='Country']

'http://schema.org/applicationCategory' is recommended to be 'GameApplication' or 'SocialNetworkingApplication' or 'TravelApplication' or 'ShoppingApplication' or 'SportsApplication' or 'LifestyleApplication' or 'BusinessApplication' or 'DesignApplication' or 'DeveloperApplication' or 'DriverApplication' or 'EducationalApplication' or 'HealthApplication' or 'FinanceApplication' or 'SecurityApplication' or 'BrowserApplication' or 'CommunicationApplication' or 'DesktopEnhancementApplication' or 'EntertainmentApplication' or 'MultimediaApplication' or 'HomeApplication' or 'UtilitiesApplication' or 'ReferenceApplication' in 'SoftwareApplication'
